mapper.select:
select ( select count(1) from fe_fire_point f left join sys_dept d on f.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} ) as firePointCount, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} ) as gatewayCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} ) as sensorCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} ) as extinguisherCount, ( ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (s.status is not null and s.status != '0') or (s.battery_level is not null and s.battery_level < 20) or (s.pressure is not null and s.pressure < 1000) or (s.pressure is not null and s.pressure > 2000) ) ) + ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (g.status is not null and g.status not in ('0', 'online')) or g.fire_point_id is null or g.dept_id is null ) ) + ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( e.dept_id is null or e.sensor_id is null or (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) ) ) ) as riskDeviceCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.status = '0' ) as sensorNormalCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.status = '1' ) as sensorAbnormalCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.status = '2' ) as sensorOfflineCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.battery_level is not null and s.battery_level < 20 ) as sensorLowBatteryCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.pressure is not null and s.pressure >= 0 and s.pressure <= 2000 and s.pressure < 1000 ) as sensorLowPressureCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and s.pressure is not null and (s.pressure < 0 or s.pressure > 2000) ) as sensorInvalidPressureCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.pressure is not null and h.pressure >= 0 and h.pressure <= 2000 ) as historySampleCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time > now() ) as historyFutureCount, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.pressure is not null and (h.pressure < 0 or h.pressure > 2000) ) as historyInvalidPressureCount, ( select round(avg(h.pressure), 2) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.pressure is not null and h.pressure >= 0 and h.pressure <= 2000 ) as avgPressure, ( select min(h.pressure) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.pressure is not null and h.pressure >= 0 and h.pressure <= 2000 ) as minPressure, ( select max(h.pressure) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.pressure is not null and h.pressure >= 0 and h.pressure <= 2000 ) as maxPressure, ( select round(avg(h.temperature), 2) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.temperature is not null ) as avgTemperature, ( select round(avg(h.battery_level), 2) from fe_sensor_history h left join fe_sensor s on h.sensor_id = s.sensor_id left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and h.create_time >= #{startTime} and h.create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and h.battery_level is not null ) as avgBatteryLevel, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and g.status in ('0', 'online') ) as gatewayNormalCount, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and g.status in ('1', 'abnormal') ) as gatewayAbnormalCount, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and g.status in ('2', 'offline') ) as gatewayOfflineCount, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and g.fire_point_id is null ) as gatewayUnboundFirePointCount, ( select count(1) from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and g.dept_id is null ) as gatewayMissingDeptCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and (e.expiry_date is null or e.expiry_date >= #{expireSoonEndTime}) and (e.scrap_date is null or e.scrap_date >= #{expireSoonEndTime}) ) as extinguisherNormalCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date >= #{endTimeExclusive} and e.expiry_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date >= #{endTimeExclusive} and e.scrap_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) ) ) as extinguisherExpiringSoonCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) ) ) as extinguisherExpiredCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and e.sensor_id is null ) as extinguisherUnboundSensorCount, ( select count(1) from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and e.dept_id is null ) as extinguisherMissingDeptCount

select d.dept_id as deptId, d.dept_name as deptName, sum(t.fire_point_count) as firePointCount, sum(t.gateway_count) as gatewayCount, sum(t.sensor_count) as sensorCount, sum(t.extinguisher_count) as extinguisherCount, sum(t.fire_point_count + t.gateway_count + t.sensor_count + t.extinguisher_count) as totalCount, sum(t.risk_count) as riskCount from ( select f.dept_id, count(1) as fire_point_count, 0 as gateway_count, 0 as sensor_count, 0 as extinguisher_count, 0 as risk_count from fe_fire_point f where (f.del_flag is null or f.del_flag = '0') group by f.dept_id union all select g.dept_id, 0, count(1), 0, 0, sum(case when g.status is not null and g.status not in ('0', 'online') or g.fire_point_id is null or g.dept_id is null then 1 else 0 end) from fe_gateway g where (g.del_flag is null or g.del_flag = '0') group by g.dept_id union all select s.dept_id, 0, 0, count(1), 0, sum(case when (s.status is not null and s.status != '0') or (s.battery_level is not null and s.battery_level < 20) or (s.pressure is not null and s.pressure >= 0 and s.pressure < 1000) or (s.pressure is not null and (s.pressure < 0 or s.pressure > 2000)) then 1 else 0 end) from fe_sensor s where (s.del_flag is null or s.del_flag = '0') group by s.dept_id union all select e.dept_id, 0, 0, 0, count(1), sum(case when e.sensor_id is null or e.dept_id is null or (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) then 1 else 0 end) from fe_extinguisher e where (e.del_flag is null or e.del_flag = '0') group by e.dept_id ) t left join sys_dept d on t.dept_id = d.dept_id where d.dept_id is not null
${params.dataScope} group by d.dept_id, d.dept_name order by riskCount desc, totalCount desc, d.dept_id asc limit 10

select '传感器' as category, case when s.pressure is not null and (s.pressure < 0 or s.pressure > 2000) then '压力脏值' when s.pressure is not null and s.pressure >= 0 and s.pressure < 1000 then '压力偏低' when s.battery_level is not null and s.battery_level < 20 then '电量偏低' when s.status = '2' then '离线' else '状态异常' end as riskType, case when s.pressure is not null and (s.pressure < 0 or s.pressure > 2000) then '数据质量' when s.pressure is not null and s.pressure >= 0 and s.pressure < 1000 then '较高' else '一般' end as riskLevel, d.dept_name as deptName, coalesce(s.sensor_code, concat('传感器#', s.sensor_id)) as itemName, s.sensor_code as itemCode, concat('压力=', coalesce(cast(s.pressure as char), '未采集'), '；电量=', coalesce(cast(s.battery_level as char), '未采集'), '；状态=', coalesce(s.status, '未设置')) as description, s.last_online_time as occurTime from fe_sensor s left join sys_dept d on s.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (s.status is not null and s.status != '0') or (s.battery_level is not null and s.battery_level < 20) or (s.pressure is not null and s.pressure < 1000) or (s.pressure is not null and s.pressure > 2000) ) order by s.last_online_time desc, s.sensor_id desc limit 20

select '网关' as category, case when g.dept_id is null then '缺失归属单位' when g.fire_point_id is null then '未绑定消防点' when g.status in ('2', 'offline') then '离线' else '状态异常' end as riskType, case when g.dept_id is null or g.fire_point_id is null then '数据质量' else '一般' end as riskLevel, d.dept_name as deptName, coalesce(g.imei, concat('网关#', g.gateway_id)) as itemName, g.imei as itemCode, concat('消防点ID=', coalesce(cast(g.fire_point_id as char), '未绑定'), '；状态=', coalesce(g.status, '未设置'), '；同步状态=', coalesce(g.sync_status, '未设置')) as description, g.last_sync_time as occurTime from fe_gateway g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( (g.status is not null and g.status not in ('0', 'online')) or g.fire_point_id is null or g.dept_id is null ) order by g.last_sync_time desc, g.gateway_id desc limit 20

select '灭火器' as category, case when e.dept_id is null then '缺失归属单位' when e.sensor_id is null then '未绑定传感器' when (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) then '已过期/报废' else '即将到期/报废' end as riskType, case when (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{endTimeExclusive}) then '较高' when e.dept_id is null or e.sensor_id is null then '数据质量' else '一般' end as riskLevel, d.dept_name as deptName, coalesce(e.label_code, concat('灭火器#', e.extinguisher_id)) as itemName, e.label_code as itemCode, concat('传感器ID=', coalesce(cast(e.sensor_id as char), '未绑定'), '；到期日=', coalesce(date_format(e.expiry_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '未设置'), '；报废日=', coalesce(date_format(e.scrap_date, '%Y-%m-%d'), '未设置')) as description, e.last_sync_time as occurTime from fe_extinguisher e left join sys_dept d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id where 1 = 1
${params.dataScope} and ( e.dept_id is null or e.sensor_id is null or (e.expiry_date is not null and e.expiry_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) or (e.scrap_date is not null and e.scrap_date < #{expireSoonEndTime}) ) order by coalesce(e.expiry_date, e.scrap_date, e.last_sync_time) asc, e.extinguisher_id desc limit 20
